title: Best Shaders Performance
description: This all-in-one performance pack on Modrinth combines the most effective FPS mods into one streamlined package.
body: ![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/980ee6b9317191830227a02ff4277cb9e84b9507.png)Best Shaders Performance Modpack: This all-in-one performance pack on Modrinth combines the most effective FPS mods into one streamlined package. It includes performance-friendly shaders and offers benchmarked FPS improvements: average ~650 FPS, peak ~960—significantly outperforming predecessors like "Simply Optimized."
